message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive Playwright E2E tests for tldr and projects pages

Adds extensive end-to-end test coverage for two major site sections,
ensuring user-facing functionality works correctly across browsers.

## tests/e2e/tldr.spec.ts (12 tests)

### Page Loading Tests
- Hero section renders with title, subtitle, stats
- Core flywheel tools section displays correctly
- Supporting tools section displays correctly

### Tool Card Interaction Tests
- Cards expand to show full content on click
- Cards collapse when clicked again
- Expand/collapse maintains other cards' state

### Search Functionality Tests
- Filters tools when searching (fuzzy match)
- Shows empty state when no results match
- Clears search with Escape key
- (Skipped) "/" keyboard shortcut (flaky in Playwright)

### Accessibility Tests
- Core tools have proper ARIA labels
- Expand buttons meet 44px touch target size

## tests/e2e/projects.spec.ts (20 tests)

### Core Functionality Tests
- Page loads without errors
- Category filter buttons display (All, Products, Research, OSS, Flywheel)
- Tag filter section displays with multiple tags
- Project cards render (100+ items)
- GitHub footer link present and correct

### Category Filtering Tests
- Products filter shows subset with count
- Research filter works correctly
- Open Source filter works correctly
- Flywheel filter shows flywheel-tagged projects
- All Work returns to showing all projects
- Flywheel visualization hides when filtering to Products

### Tag Filtering Tests
- Clicking tag filters projects
- Clear button appears when tags selected
- Multiple tags can be selected (shows count)
- Tags toggle off when clicked again

### Combined Filtering Tests
- Category and tag filters work together
- Results count updates with combined filters

### Accessibility Tests
- Proper ARIA attributes on filter tabs
- aria-selected, aria-controls present
- Keyboard-navigable filters

### Responsive Design Tests
- Mobile viewport (375x667) displays correctly
- Tablet viewport (768x1024) displays correctly

## Test Configuration
- Uses Playwright's webServer to auto-start dev server
- Parallel test execution for speed
- Console logging for debugging
- Screenshot on failure

Run with: bunx playwright test tests/e2e/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
